creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Testbuild fine on 10.3i.

Failed on 12a, 11a, 9.3a:

http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/devel__bazel-93a-1480919051.txt
http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/devel__bazel-11a-1480919051.txt
http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/devel__bazel-cur-1480919051.txt

It looks like there's a patch needed to properly include definitions
for time_t on 11 and 12.

On 9.3, it something else. Can you update the shar ?
